bead.title: Remove ~/.config/agent/models.yaml parser; use svc.ListProfiles / ResolveProfile / ProfileAliases
bead.description:
Land agent-1a0c0502 independent stream from parent bead ddx-7bc0c8d5. Safe to land in any order relative to the parser+GlobalProviderHealth atomic pair.

## File to rewrite

cli/internal/agent/agent_catalog_shared.go reads ~/.config/agent/models.yaml directly and hard-codes surface translations ("agent.openai" → "embedded-openai").

## Migration target

- svc.ListProfiles
- svc.ResolveProfile
- svc.ProfileAliases

Surface translations that were hard-coded in the consumer should move to (or be obtained from) the upstream profile API.
bead.acceptance:
(1) cli/internal/agent/agent_catalog_shared.go no longer reads ~/.config/agent/models.yaml.
(2) Catalog surface translations sourced from svc.ListProfiles / ResolveProfile / ProfileAliases.
(3) No hard-coded alias maps like "agent.openai" → "embedded-openai" remain in consumer code.
(4) go -C cli build ./... and go -C cli test ./... green.
